series_metadata.series_description: Files documenting the process by which applicants file for education assistance funds, including the application for education assistance funds, educational transcripts, FAFSA forms and information, college course and tuition information, amount of monies disbursed to applicant, and correspondence to and from the applicant.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: proof of completion of at least one section of CPA Exam fund recipients ; Paper: proof of completion of at least one section of CPA Exam fund recipients; one year has elapsed since application was approved, but no funds requested. six months applicant is notified of denial of their request
